from unittest.mock import patch

# Violation: test function stacks too many mock patch decorators (hard to read/maintain)
@patch("app.db")
@patch("app.api")
@patch("app.cache")
@patch("app.logger")
@patch("app.notifier")
@patch("app.metrics")
def test_complex_flow(m1, m2, m3, m4, m5, m6):
    assert True
